stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In the ATS flight plan Item 15, for a flight along a designated route, where the departure aerodrome is not on or connected to that route:

options.a: it is necessary only to give the first reporting point on that route.
options.b: it is not necessary to indicate the point of joining that route as it will be obvious to the ATS unit.
options.c: the words “as cleared” should be entered.
options.d: the letters “DCT” should be entered, followed by the point of joining the ATS route.
